title: Vivo Mobile Phones Price in Nepal

content:
Vivo: Brand Overview Vivo is a Chinese smartphone manufacturer under the BBK umbrella. Founded in 2009, the company sells phones in over 60 countries today. With a primary focus on a joyful user experience, great cameras, and reliable battery life; Vivo has skyrocketed in popularity, especially among youths and millennials. Thanks to that, Vivo is a major player in Russia, Cambodia, Laos, Bangladesh, and Nepalese markets. With a major emphasis on the camera experience, Vivo partnered with the popular industry leader in optoelectronics Zeiss to "develop breakthrough innovations in mobile imaging technology". Apart from that, Vivo devices are also affordable and fairly priced. And Vivo offers a wide catalog of devices to cater to a large customer base. Vivo in Nepal Vivo is a major player in Nepal. Vivo's Y and V series are very popular here. There are 2 official distributors of Vivo phones in Nepal- Cellucity and Apex Manakamana. The great thing about purchasing a Vivo is the 0% EMI (for phones over NPR 15000) offered by the companies. On top, Vivo phones and accessories are also heavily discounted during the "Sales Carnival" Event held annually. Vivo Y Series Vivo sells stylish yet accessible devices under its Y series. Starting under 15K, these Vivo devices mainly focus on the needs of a typical user. As such, they have beautifying features, bright designs, and cool cameras. To provide a merry user experience, Vivo has made sure to include large batteries and big screens. Vivo V Series But if you're looking for a bit more, then there's the V series. These offer improvements all around. Firstly the chipsets are more powerful and the devices run much smoother than most Y series phones. The cameras also get extra bells and whistles with better main sensors and extra lenses. The designs feel elegant and the build more premium. Besides that, they offer features like super fast charging speeds, fluid high refresh rate screens, faster connectivity options, and some even offer 5G. Service Centers of Vivo in Nepal If you're thinking about buying a Vivo, there are more than 500 retail ships scattered throughout the country. Or you can order them online. In case of customer support and repairs, Vivo's got you covered as well. These are the authorized Vivo Repairs Shops in Nepal.[su_table] City Location Contact No Kathmandu Shop No: 306A, 306B, 2nd floor, CTC Mall, Sundhara Chitwan 2nd floor KL Mall, Lions Chowk 05-6493480 Pokhara 3rd Floor, Mobile Tower, Mahendra Pul 06-1585397 Itahari 3rd Floor, Itahari Central Plaza, Itahari 02-5590038 For customer support, you can contact them online at @chat.vivo.com or call them directly at 18000010168 (Toll-free for NTC users) 014257420 Vivo also has a dedicated site for inquiries about repairs and spare parts: vivo Nepal . Vivo in Nepal: Conclusion Vivo has become one of the major brands in Nepal over time. Its commitment to offering affordable and feature-rich smartphones has positioned it as a significant player in the Nepali market, providing consumers with accessible technology that meets their needs. Though mostly on the budget and midrange side, Vivo's dedication to offering great camera experience paired with their unique designs makes them feel premium. Frequently Asked Questions Are Vivo phones good for selfies? Where can I buy Vivo phones in Nepal? Are Vivo phones good for gaming? How is the battery life of Vivo phones? Can I expand the storage of Vivo phones? Do Vivo phones come with a warranty?
